title: Execute DEC-012 git sequence: commit A, push, reconcile B
description: Execute the blocked DEC-012 end-of-batch git sequence per HANDOFF-DEC012-git-sequence-codex-lab-limo.md: single clean commit of .gitignore + MAP_System in canonical repo A, push to origin, then reconcile ~/Projects/MultiAgentProject (B) by rename-to-stale-archive + fresh clone + private Pathwell/Backups restore from A. Authorized by operator continue (hcom #14717) after limo's approval-limit blocker (#14695).
acceptance_criteria: Staged diff contains no path under Projects/
Commit and push from A succeed; announced via hcom before push
B preserved via rename (nothing deleted), fresh clone matches remote, private dirs restored from A
Git lock acquired before and released after
objective: Execute the DEC-012 end-of-batch git sequence: one clean commit of the validated MAP remediation state in canonical repo A, push to origin, and reconcile stale repo B without losing its private untracked content.
forbidden_changes: Staging or committing anything under Projects/
Deleting repo B or any of its contents (rename to stale archive only)
Force-push or history rewrite on origin
expected_artifacts: One commit on A's main pushed to origin
B recloned from remote with private Projects/Pathwell and Projects/Backups restored from A
Freeze marker in the renamed stale archive
reviewer_role: technical_lead (codex-lab-limo when approval capacity returns, or command-center)
risk: Medium: push is outward-facing; B reconciliation touches a second repo. Mitigations: no-Projects-staged verification before commit, rename-not-delete for B, git operation lock held throughout, per-gate hcom reports.
